name: build-expense-manager
description: Build a new Retool app from a description — tests NEW workflow with crud + master-detail patterns
prompt: Build me a Retool app for managing employee expenses. I need a table showing all expense reports with columns: employee name, amount, category, status, and date. Users should be able to create new expenses via a modal form, edit existing ones in a side panel, and approve/reject by changing status. Output a zip I can import into Retool.

components: Table with 5+ columns (employee_name, amount, category, status, date)
Modal with Form for creating expenses
Form inside detail pane with initialData binding
queries: UPDATE_BY query with filterBy and success events
patterns: Event chains: mutate → refresh → UI update
Status change via Select with approve/reject options
expected.output: zip file that can be imported into Retool

name: add-search-filter
description: Add features to an existing CRUD Table App — tests EDIT workflow with client-side filtering
prompt: I have a CRUD Table App. Add a search bar and a status filter dropdown above the table. Use client-side setFilterStack filtering instead of SQL WHERE clauses.

new_components: TextInput searchInput with search icon and debounced change event
Select statusFilter with static options and change event
new_queries: JavascriptQuery applyFilters that builds filter stack from widget values
positions: searchInput and statusFilter on same row above table

name: improve-master-detail
description: Improve an existing Master-Detail App — tests IMPROVE workflow with production patterns
prompt: Review my Retool app and make it production-ready with best practices.

improvements: Add requireConfirmation on destructive queries (if any DELETE exists)
Add loading/disableSubmit states on forms if missing
Add re-select row after update (selectRow event)
Add clearSelection after delete if delete exists
expected.audit: Presents improvement checklist findings before making changes
